metadata.title:
Birth-Pains

Behold the signs of universal unrest:

pages.raw_text:
Behold the signs of universal unrest:
Portugal dethrones her king and sets up republic.


Belgium pets her royal master with socalistic PAM
phlets and demands universal suffrage.


Germany boldly arraigns her kaiser because he lauds
his ancestors and revves the doctrine Of the divine right
of kings.


England assaults the most ancient privileges of her
nobes while the sufragetes smash every window in the
prime minister's house.


Mexico seethes with revolution in dozen states and
struggles to overtun dynasty ruling nation which
republic only in name.


Even the United States has made history in these
strenuous times It has broken the shackles of party
tyranny, made political alignmens, and foreshad-
owed bigger things to


Such the pains which betoken A NEW BIRTH
OF FREEDOM
